_comment_purpose: Per-agent intent file. The LIVE settings the harness reads are composed by orchestrator/bootstrap.py into state/.openharness/settings.json (OPENHARNESS_CONFIG_DIR). Only the path_rules below are consumed by the orchestrator.

_tools_intent: product.* and roadmap.* (read + write) from the mock MCP server. NOT marketing.* or finance.*.
